Variables.Name: BakingLayout
Variables.Description: By luciuszhang: Baking layout mode

Variables.Name: NumCoarseSamples
Variables.Description: Number of first pass light samples.

Variables.Name: NumSamples
Variables.Description: Number of second pass light samples for two pass mode and samples for brute force mode.

Variables.Name: NumLightingBounces
Variables.Description:
Number of light bounces to simulate for point  spot  directional lights, starting from the light source.
	 0 is direct lighting only, 1 is one bounce, etc.
	 Bounce 1 takes the most time to calculate and contributes the most to visual quality, followed by bounce 2.
	 Successive bounces don't really affect build times, but have a much lower visual impact, unless the material diffuse colors are close to 1.

Variables.Name: LightmapBoost
Variables.Description: Scales the lightmap result of idea baking.

Variables.Name: SunHardness
Variables.Description: Control Sun direction falloff, bigger SunHardness, three direction will be more separated

Variables.Name: BakingMode
Variables.Description: Baking path tracing mode, just for debug

Variables.Name: bUseParallelBaking
Variables.Description: If true, parallel baking will be enabled.

Variables.Name: bUseConservativeRasterization
Variables.Description: If true, Conservative Rasterization (emulated by multi-tap) will be enabled.

Variables.Name: bUseLocalOcclusion
Variables.Description: If true, local ambient occlusion (A0) will be enabled.

Variables.Name: LocalOcclusionRadius
Variables.Description: Local ambient occlusion(A0) tracing radius.

Variables.Name: LocalOcclusionFallOff
Variables.Description: Local ambient occlusion(A0) transition speed.

Variables.Name: LocalOcclusionDistribution
Variables.Description: Local ambient occlusion(A0) sampling distribution.

Variables.Name: LocalOcclusionFadeRatio
Variables.Description: Local ambient occlusion(A0) fade start ratio.

Variables.Name: LocalOcclusionRes
Variables.Description: Local ambient occlusion(A0) resolution multiple.

Variables.Name: LocalOcclusionMultiple
Variables.Description: Local ambient occlusion(A0) sampling multiple.

Variables.Name: LocalOcclusionPower
Variables.Description: Local ambient occlusion(A0) strength, larger value, darker AO.

Variables.Name: LocalOcclusionDenoising
Variables.Description: Local ambient occlusion(A0) denoising filter count.

Variables.Name: LocalOcclusionDilation
Variables.Description: Local ambient occlusion(A0) dilation filter count.

Variables.Name: NumDenoisingIterators
Variables.Description: If true, denoise filter will be enabled.

Variables.Name: NumDilationIterators
Variables.Description: If true, dilation filter will be enabled.

Variables.Name: DirectLightDenoising
Variables.Description: Denoising filter iteration number for direct lighting.

Variables.Name: RayTraceMaxDistance
Variables.Description: By luciuszhang: Path tracing distance threshold in centimeters.

Variables.Name: RayTraceBias
Variables.Description: By luciuszhang: Path tracing ray bias in centimeters.

Variables.Name: RetraceDistance
Variables.Description: By luciuszhang: Retrace distance threshold in centimeters.

Variables.Name: SmallestTexelRadius
Variables.Description:
By luciuszhang:
	 Smallest texel radius allowed, useful for clamping edge cases where some texels have a radius of 0.
	 This should be smaller than the smallest valid texel radius in the scene.

Variables.Name: AreaLightSampleCount
Variables.Description: Path tracing distance threshold in centimeters.

Variables.Name: bWithPortalDirectLighting
Variables.Description: If true, calculate portal light direct lighting.

Variables.Name: bWithGrayDiffuse
Variables.Description: If true, use gray diffuse material for sun indirect lighting.
